subcodes.first_line: O pure leaf! Set thy hopes upon the grace of God, for the greatest means of attaining the bounties of the Abhá Kingdom is endurance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه طیبه از لطف حق امیدوار شو و اعظم وسائل حصول عنایت ملکوت ابهی تحمل
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
